{
  "judge_id": "JG-001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.2": 4, "R1.7": 5, "RX.1": 4, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 5},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The output identifies multiple inconsistencies and provides localized fixes, walking the chain end-to-end.",
    "R1.7": "Every citation is audited with precision, and missing key works are flagged with bibliographic detail.",
    "RX.1": "Uncertainty is disclosed for several claims, including the need to verify references and the characterization of Achiam et al. (2017).",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift or additional coverage.",
    "RX.4": "No new errors, fabrications, or harmful content are introduced; all feedback is constructive and focused on accuracy.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear provenance."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The output identifies multiple inconsistencies and provides localized fixes, walking the chain end-to-end.
rationale.R1.7: Every citation is audited with precision, and missing key works are flagged with bibliographic detail.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is disclosed for several claims, including the need to verify references and the characterization of Achiam et al. (2017).
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift or additional coverage.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors, fabrications, or harmful content are introduced; all feedback is constructive and focused on accuracy.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear provenance.
